dimension._note: z = x*y = 2 players * 12 min = 24; the game itself is a 4-dimensional manifold (4D board)

substrates._note: plane = 3D board lattice; height = 4D turn deltas. game.js is thin: input -> substrate.apply() -> lens -> render.

scenarios.name: CLASSIC
scenarios.desc:
4 in a row ΓÇö any direction.
76 possible winning lines.

scenarios.name: BLITZ 3
scenarios.desc:
First to 3 in a row wins.
Fast games, sneaky angles.

scenarios.name: DIAGONAL
scenarios.desc:
Only diagonal lines score.
Pure spatial mastery.

scenarios.name: CUBE QUEST
scenarios.desc:
First to fill a 2x2x2
cube of your pieces wins.

scenarios.name: TERRITORY
scenarios.desc:
Fill the board ΓÇö most
winning combos wins.

scenarios.name: SPEED DROP
scenarios.desc:
10 seconds per turn.
Miss it ΓÇö forfeit the drop!

substrate_refactor.plane_substrate: done -- BoardManifold owns 3D cell lattice + lenses (findLine, checkCube, countAllLines, countThreats, checkWin, columnFull, lowestFree, place, reset, snapshot, restore, boardFull, filled, dirLabel, openColumns)
substrate_refactor.height_substrate: done -- Turns owns 4D turn deltas with O(1) indexes (counts, scores, streaks, logs) via database-index pattern
substrate_refactor.rules_moved: done -- game.js no longer duplicates board/dir/win logic; calls BM.* and TS.*
substrate_refactor.scenarios_as_attribute: done -- SCENARIOS array lives in manifold.game.json:attributes.scenarios, loaded via fetch at bootstrap
substrate_refactor.thin_shell_html: done -- game.html is 103 lines, scaffold + script tags only
substrate_refactor.procedural_geometry: done -- connect4.glb (27.4 MB) replaced by Schwartz-P minimal surface from m=x*y*z; jupiter.glb (3.5 MB) replaced by banded SphereGeometry; GLTFLoader removed from runtime

todo: Consolidate CSS: deduplicate per-game arcade theme against shared palette/fonts when available
